channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Super Mario Bros. Wonder Has Been Updated To Version 1.1.0, Here Are The Full Patch Notes - Nintendo Life
item.description:
1. Super Mario Bros. Wonder Has Been Updated To Version 1.1.0, Here Are The Full Patch Notes  Nintendo Life
  2. Super Mario Bros. Wonder 1.1.0 update out now, patch notes  Nintendo Everything
  3. A trunk load of fun awaits in Bellabel Park—exclusively for Nintendo Switch 2! – News – Nintendo Official Site  Nintendo
  4. See New Super Mario Wonder and Super Mario Galaxy Movie Trailers  Siliconera
  5. Nintendo unveils new Mario Bros. Wonder Nintendo Switch 2 Edition overview trailer for Mario Day  9to5Toys

item.title: “Not even the littlest bit": GTA 6 publisher CEO doesn't think genAI will level the playing field for smaller devs - Rock Paper Shotgun
item.description:
1. “Not even the littlest bit": GTA 6 publisher CEO doesn't think genAI will level the playing field for smaller devs  Rock Paper Shotgun
  2. GTA 6 couldn't be made with AI — that's "laughable," Take-Two boss says  Polygon.com
  3. ‘Grand Theft Auto’ boss shuts down Elon Musk’s “laughable” great AI games claim  NME
  4. GTA Publisher Says AI Can't Create Mega-Hit Games And Calls The Idea Laughable  HotHardware
  5. “That won’t help you create hits”: Boss of “Grand Theft Auto” company laughs off AI’s threat to the game  Yahoo Tech

item.title: Tomb Raider Remastered studio denies using generative AI after new Challenge Mode gets panned by players - Eurogamer
item.description:
1. Tomb Raider Remastered studio denies using generative AI after new Challenge Mode gets panned by players  Eurogamer
  2. Aspyr Pushes Back On Tomb Raider 1-3 Remastered Outfits Backlash, Insists 'No AI Generated Assets Were Used'  IGN
  3. "Crystal Dynamics Should Issue A Partial Refund For Forcing This On Us" - Tomb Raider Remastered's New Outfits Aren't Going Down Well  Time Extension
  4. The remastered collection of the first Tomb Raider games just got a controversial patch with some truly terrible-looking new outfits: 'Lara deserves better than this'  PC Gamer
  5. Tomb Raider I-III Remastered: New outfits and Challenge Mode added in free update today  PlayStation.Blog

item.title: The way you walk can reveal your true feelings - Phys.org
item.description:
1. The way you walk can reveal your true feelings  Phys.org
  2. How you walk reveals to others how you are feeling, researchers say  The Guardian
  3. Psychologist Says if You Always Walk Faster Than Others, You Likely Have These 7 Traits  Parade
  4. What swinging your arms when you walk really means, according to science  Indy100
  5. This is what your walk says about your personality, according to new study  UNILAD

item.title: Xbox Project Helix and DLSS 5 Show How the Next Generation Of Gaming Is Going To Be Expensive and Weird - IGN
item.description:
1. Xbox Project Helix and DLSS 5 Show How the Next Generation Of Gaming Is Going To Be Expensive and Weird  IGN
  2. From GDC: Building the Next Generation of Xbox  Xbox Wire
  3. Xbox Shares New Hardware Details For Next Generation Console, Project Helix  Game Informer
  4. Microsoft will start providing game studios with Project Helix consoles in 2027  Engadget
  5. Xbox Project Helix's official name has fans concerned  MSN

item.title: iOS 26.4 upgrades one of my most-used Control Center features in a big way - 9to5Mac
item.description: iOS 26.4 upgrades one of my most-used Control Center features in a big way  9to5MacView Full Coverage on Google News
